h1: LG CordZero™ A9 Kompressor Cordless Stick + Handheld Vacuum (A9K-SOLO)

gallery.a: Front view of LG CordZero A9 Kompressor in Fantasy Silver (A9K-SOLO) on charging cradle
Left side view on charging cradle
Right side view on charging cradle
LED display ON — power indicator and battery level

modules.head: Powerful Suction for a Deep Clean
modules.body: The combination of the Smart Inverter Motor™ and the Axial Turbo Cyclone, which separates dirt and dust, delivers powerful, long-lasting suction up to 220W.

imgs.a: Powerful suction with Smart Inverter Motor + Axial Turbo Cyclone

modules.head: Durable, long-lasting cleaning technology
modules.body: The Smart Inverter Motor™ is a brushless design with minimal mechanical friction. This improves durability and enables LG to offer a 10-year parts warranty on the motor.
modules.disc: *10-year limited warranty on the Smart Inverter Motor. Terms and conditions apply.

imgs.a: Handle and exploded view of the Smart Inverter Motor

modules.head: Compress Dust and Hair in the Bin — Empty Less Often
modules.body: LG Kompressor™ technology compresses dust and hair collected in the bin by up to 2.4× the uncompressed capacity — so you empty less often. When it is time to empty, simply pull the Kompressor lever with the door open to clear the contents.
modules.disc: *Up to 2.4× capacity vs uncompressed bin. Tested under LG's internal conditions; actual compression may vary with debris type.

imgs.a: LG Kompressor mechanism compressing dust and hair in the bin

modules.head: Up to 60 minutes per charge
modules.body: One included lithium-ion battery delivers up to 60 minutes of cleaning in Normal mode (without nozzles). Full recharge in 240 minutes. Battery Status Indicator on the handle keeps you informed at a glance.
modules.disc: *Run time varies by power mode and nozzle: Normal w/o Nozzle 60 min; Normal + Power Drive 40 min; Power mode 30 min; Turbo mode 7 min.

imgs.a: Removable lithium-ion battery with charge indicator

modules.head: Store and Charge Anywhere — No Drills Required
modules.body: The included charging stand offers three storage options — self-standing, compact, and traditional wall mount — so you can place your vacuum neatly in any room without drilling holes.

imgs.a: Three storage options: self-standing, compact, wall-mount

modules.head: Control everything with your thumb
modules.body: On, Off and power modes (Normal / Power / Turbo) are all operated with a single touch of your thumb on the ergonomic handle — no awkward trigger grips.

imgs.a: Thumb-operated handle with On/Off, Power and Turbo buttons

modules.head: Adjustable length for versatile reach
modules.body: The telescopic wand extends and retracts to suit different users and spaces — ideal for floors, high shelves and hard-to-reach corners. Converts to handheld mode in seconds.

imgs.a: Telescopic wand with multiple length positions

modules.head: Removable & washable filters
modules.body: The metal filter, cloth pre-filter and fine-dust filter all detach easily and rinse clean under running water — so maintenance is simple and suction performance stays strong.
modules.disc: *Filters must be fully dry before reinstalling. Do not use hot water or detergents.

imgs.a: Washable filters rinsed under running water

modules.head: 99.999% fine dust capture
modules.body: The 5-step filtration system (1st cyclone → metal dust filter → 2nd cyclone → pre-filter → fine dust filter) captures on average 99.999% of fine dust particles between 0.5 μm and 4.2 μm — keeping exhaust air clean for homes with allergies and pets.

imgs.a: Exploded view of the 5-step filtration system

modules.head: Smart alerts and cleaning history
modules.body: Connect with the LG ThinQ® app to monitor filter status, battery level, run diagnosis and review cleaning history — all from your smartphone.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ® app available on compatible Android and iOS devices. Wi-Fi connection and registration required.

imgs.a: LG ThinQ app showing cleaning history and filter status

specs.v: Yes (metal filter, cloth pre-filter, fine dust filter)
